overall.description: A hooded player character stands on a rocky cliff edge overlooking a vast mountain vista at golden hour in a video game (Elden Ring). The scene features dramatic cloud formations, a snow-capped peak in the distance, a serene lake below, and warm sunlight breaking through the clouds. The character remains mostly stationary with subtle movements while observing the landscape.

scene_state.functional_zone: rocky cliff overlook with mountain vista

events.description: character raises right arm and gestures toward the mountain vista

agents.ego_description: standing still on the cliff edge, gazing out at the mountain vista with occasional subtle shifts in posture and arm movement

entered.detail: large snow-capped peak dominating the horizon with sunlight illuminating the summit
weathered stone monument or marker at the edge of the cliff
calm reflective body of water nestled in the valley below
dense green treetops covering the valley floor between the cliff and the mountain
layered mountain ridges fading into the atmospheric haze
dramatic golden-tinged clouds backlit by the setting or rising sun

segments.scene_description: The player character stands on a rocky cliff edge overlooking a breathtaking mountain vista during golden hour. A snow-capped peak dominates the distant horizon while a calm lake and forest fill the valley below. The scene is framed by an ancient stone pillar to the left and dramatic backlit clouds overhead. The character raises their arm briefly around the 12-second mark, gesturing toward the mountain, before returning to a contemplative stance.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot captures a steady, contemplative gaze from a rocky precipice overlooking a vast, sun-drenched mountain wilderness. It begins with the player character positioned beside an ancient stone pillar, framing a breathtaking vista where a snow-capped peak dominates the distant horizon. As the camera lingers, the view expands to reveal a calm lake and dense forests filling the valley below under a canopy of dramatic, backlit clouds. The character briefly raises an arm to gesture toward the towering mountains before returning to a still, observant stance amidst the golden hour light.
